description: This wallet from bulchees Ufficio collection is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Bulchee has transformed this traditional accessory by combining classic techniques and innovative designs along with the durability of synthetic leather. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Warranty: 3 monthsDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHas two main compartments with textile lining with a flap to separate your important papersFour credit card slots on the leftTwo slip pockets on either sideA pocket on the right with a press buttoned closure for coinsStitch detailing and branding embossed on the front for styleCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
